Created attachment 252619
www/ytdownloader

(In reply to Gleb Popov from comment #19)

> Can you  put LICENSE and icon.png files into the archive
> so that the port won't need to download them separately?

Yes, I did include LICENSE file in the zip archive and the Makefile will pull the icon from the zip archive instead of downloading.

Thanks.
